errors.needsRecharge: The robot needs to recharge after selling.
errors.sellBeforeAnythingElse: The robot needs to go and sell before it does anything else.
errors.sellNumber: You can only sell a number of nuggets

checks.notSold: You didn't sell your nuggets. Make sure you call sell() after panning.
checks.wrongSoldTotal: Expected to sell {{expectedTotal}} nuggets ({{panValues}}) but you sold {{got}}. Make sure you add each pan result to your running total.

panAndSell.name: Pan for gold and sell your haul
panAndSell.description: Pan 5 times to collect gold nuggets, keeping a running total, then sell everything at the trading post.

randomPans.name: Pan and sell
randomPans.description: Pan 5 times for a random number of nuggets each time, then sell the total.

wrongSellAmount.question: It says I'm selling the wrong amount of gold.
wrongSellAmount.answer: You need to sell ALL the gold you find in the 5 pans in one go at the end, not selling after each pan.

trackingTotal.question: I am using pan multiple times but I don't know how to keep track of how much I have.
trackingTotal.answer: Think about what you've learned in recent video lessons. You need to use a variable to keep track of the **total** amount of gold that you have collected across **all** the pans together.

fiveLines.question: I've got it working, but I can't get down to 5 lines.
fiveLines.answer: Do you have repetitive code in your solution? If so, what can we use to reduce that repetitiveness?

stillFiveLines.question: I still can't get it down to 5 lines of code.
stillFiveLines.answer: You should only need to use one variable. Are you using more?

describers.sell: sold ${arg1} nuggets at the trading post

pan.description: Dips your pan in the river and **gives back** the number of gold nuggets found.

sell.description: Sells your gold nuggets at the trading post.
